---
title: "Selina Frances Heathcote"
---

## Selina Frances Heathcote

**Dates:** (4 May 1842-1916)

### Description

daughter of Sir William Heathcote.

### Biography

As a child she had irons on her legs and is called \'little Fanny\'.  The 1901 census describes her as ‘Feeble-minded (from childhood).’

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
